User.title: User Profile
User.description: User subscription tier metadata and keychain credentials configuration.

userId.description: Unique authenticated Firebase UID representing the account owner.

tier.description: Simulation service tier tier limits configuration.

customApiKey.description: Optional personal Gemini credential string cached client-side.

language.description: The user's preferred application locale state.

Recording.title: Recording
Recording.description: Verbatim transcript, summary action items, and voice note audio metadata.

duration.description: Duration of voice recording in seconds.

transcript.description: Complete transcribe textual word-by-word playback feed.

modelUsed.description: The exact model tag executing analysis.

audioData.description: Base64 base-encoded raw voice recording string for direct browser playback audio node.

/users/{userId}.description: Isolated individual user accounts profile records.

/users/{userId}/recordings/{recordingId}.description: Users individual voice recorded outline notes.
